markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and exploratory discussion between Marcel (GrowthX) and Viviana (Felicis Ventures) about GrowthX's AI-powered content creation platform and business model.](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has developed an AI-powered platform for content creation, combining workflows, human expertise, and machine learning](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [The company raised a $12M Series A from Madrona Venture Group, skipping seed stage](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [GrowthX is seeing strong inbound interest from brands, currently serving customers like Ramp and Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [The platform has potential applications beyond content, including areas like recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Platform

  - [Built on Marcel's expertise in organic growth and content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows to distill expert knowledge into repeatable processes](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Combines AI automation with human interventions for high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Platform includes a task hub, learn engine, and workflow management system](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Processed \~500,000 workflow runs last month](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### Business Model and Team Structure

  - [60-person team split into "build" (20 people) and "deliver" (40 people) sides](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Build team: Principal engineers and former CTOs/co-founders](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Deliver team: Experienced content leaders (e.g., former TechCrunch editor, Apple blog manager)](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Services-led approach provides revenue to fund platform development](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Funding and Growth

  - [Raised $12M Series A from Madrona Venture Group, skipping seed stage](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=995.0)
  - [Strong inbound interest from brands, minimal outbound sales efforts so far](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Customers include Ramp, Webflow, and other "awesome legit brands"](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Focused on reasonable valuation to benefit employees and maintain optionality](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

### Future Directions and Market Opportunity

  - [Potential to expand platform beyond content into areas like recruiting](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)
  - [Building company in an "AI-native way," solving internal needs that could become new product lines](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Exploring events and networking opportunities with VCs and CMOs](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel and Viviana to schedule in-person coffee meeting when Viviana is next in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Explore potential for GrowthX to host a CMO event with Felicis Ventures](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Continue discussions on GrowthX's progress and potential areas for expansion](https://fathom.video/share/HX5hUw8zuM1orw1WSb5csmDzZcudQssi?tab=summary&timestamp=1468.0)
